contentBody.headMarkup:
<title>Welcome to LWC Communities!</title>

<!-- branding stylesheets -->

<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/salesforce-lightning-design-system.min.css?{ versionKey }"/>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/dxp-site-spacing-styling-hooks.min.css?{ versionKey }" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/dxp-styling-hooks.min.css?{ versionKey }" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/dxp-slds-extensions.min.css?{ versionKey }" />



<link rel="preload" href="{ basePath }/assets/fonts/webfonts/SalesforceSans-Light.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin="anonymous" fetchPriority="low"/>
<link rel="preload" href="{ basePath }/assets/fonts/webfonts/SalesforceSans-Regular.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin="anonymous" fetchPriority="low"/>
<link rel="preload" href="{ basePath }/assets/fonts/webfonts/SalesforceSans-Bold.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin="anonymous" fetchPriority="low"/>
<!-- branding stylesheets-->

<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ styles/styles.css }" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ styles/print.css }" media="print"/>

<style>    
    
    .transparent flowruntime-flow {
        background:none !important;
    }
    
    /* Bold standard form labels, but exclude those inside radio or checkbox groups */
.slds-form-element__label:not(.slds-form-element__legend):not(.slds-radio__label .slds-form-element__label):not(.slds-checkbox__label .slds-form-element__label) {
  font-weight: bold;
}

/* Bold group label (radio or checkbox legend) */
.slds-form-element__legend {
  font-weight: bold;
}

/* Ensure radio and checkbox choice labels are normal */
.slds-radio__label .slds-form-element__label,
.slds-checkbox__label .slds-form-element__label {
  font-weight: normal;
}

    
    .slds-input {
     text-align: left;
    }
    
    .helptext__popup
    {
        font-size: 16px !important;
    }
    
    .slds-is-open>.slds-accordion__summary {
    margin-bottom: 20px;
}
    
    .slds-accordion__summary-content {
        font-size:1.4em;  
    }
    
    .slds-button.slds-accordion__summary-action {
    padding: 10px;
}
    
    
.custom-button-link {
    color: #0070d2; /* SLDS blue for text color */
    text-decoration: none; /* Remove underline for link */
}

    .slds-textarea[readonly] {
  resize: none; /* Hide the resize handle */
  overflow: hidden; /* Hide scrollbars */
  border: none; /* Remove visible border */
  box-shadow: none; /* Remove border-like shadows */
  background-color: transparent; /* Optional: make it blend in */
  cursor: default; /* Optional: prevent text cursor */
}
    
.custom-button-link:hover {
    color: #005fb2; /* Darker blue on hover */
    text-decoration: underline; /* Underline on hover for emphasis */
}
    
    .hr-no-margin{
        margin-top:0px;
        margin-bottom:0px;
    }
    
    /* Increase size for easier targeting */
input[type="checkbox"],
input[type="radio"] {
    width: 1.5em;
    height: 1.5em;
    margin: 0.2em;
}

/* Add visible labels for screen readers and speech recognition */
label {
    font-size: 1.1em;
    margin-left: 0.3em;
    cursor: pointer;
}

/* Enhance checked state visibility */
input[type="checkbox"]:checked + label,
input[type="radio"]:checked + label {
    color: #005A9E; /* Distinctive color when checked */
}

/* Improve spacing and alignment */
.checkbox-group,
.radio-group {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1em;
    margin: 0.5em 0;
}
    
 /* Accessibility for screen readers */   
    input:focus {
    border: 2px solid #005fb2 !important;
    outline: 3px solid #003479 !important;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(0, 95, 178, 0.8);
}
    
  .slds-radio input:focus + .slds-radio__label {
    outline: 1px solid #003479 !important;
    border-radius: 4px;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(0, 95, 178, 0.8);
}
    
 .slds-button:focus {
    border: 2px solid #005fb2 !important;
    outline: 3px solid #003479 !important;
    box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(0, 95, 178, 0.8) !important;
    border-radius: 6px !important;;
    transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out !important;;
}
    
.slds-checkbox input:focus + .slds-checkbox__label {
    outline: 1px solid #003479 !important;
    border-radius: 4px !important;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(0, 95, 178, 0.8) !important;
    transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out !important;
}
    
 /* Enhancing date picker input styling */
.slds-input[type="date"],
.slds-input[type="datetime-local"] {
    padding: 0.5rem;
    border: 2px solid #0070d2; /* Salesforce blue */
    border-radius: 0.25rem;
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: #333;
}

/* Improve focus visibility */
.slds-input[type="date"]:focus,
.slds-input[type="datetime-local"]:focus {
    outline: 3px solid #005A9E;
    outline-offset: 2px;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(0, 90, 158, 0.5);
}

/* Enhancing calendar popup styling */
.slds-datepicker {
    border: 2px solid #0070d2;
    border-radius: 0.25rem;
    padding: 0.5rem;
}

.slds-datepicker table td {
    padding: 0.3rem;
    text-align: center;
    cursor: pointer;
}

.slds-datepicker table td:hover,
.slds-datepicker table td:focus {
    background-color: #f3f4f6;
    outline: 2px solid #005A9E;
}

/* Accessibility for screen readers */
.slds-input[aria-invalid="true"] {
    border-color: #d13239; /* Red border for errors */
    outline: 3px solid #d13239;
}

.slds-assistive-text {
    position: absolute;
    clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px);
}
    
    
     /* Prevent format changes in focus on read-only events */ 
    .slds-input[readonly],
    .slds-textarea[readonly] {
     border: none;            /* Remove the visible border */
     box-shadow: none;        /* Remove inner or outer shadow */
     outline: none;           /* Optional: removes blue focus ring */
     resize: vertical;            /* Allow user to resize vertically only*/
     overflow: auto;          /* Show scrollbars if needed */
     background-color: transparent;  /* Optional: for seamless styling */
     padding: 0.5rem;         /* Optional: keep some internal spacing */
     font-size:1.1rem;
}
    
    .slds-textarea[readonly]:hover,
.slds-textarea[readonly]:focus {
  border: 1px solid #ccc;     /* Light border on hover/focus */
  border-radius: 4px;         /* Optional: rounded corners */
  background-color: #f9f9f9;  /* Optional: slight background on interaction */
  cursor: default;            /* Optional: keep it non-editable in appearance */
}
    
    .private-ssr-placeholder-class {
      text-align:left !important;  
    }
    
    .slds-grid_align-end {
    justify-content: flex-start !important;
        }
    
         /* Suppress Asterisks on mandatory fields */ 
  .slds-required {
    display: none !important;
}
  
.govuk-button {    
background-color: rgb(0, 52, 121) !important;
    }
    
    
    
    
</style>
